outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Hezbollah's nearly undetectable fiber-optic drones are changing the war in Lebanon
outlets.summary: CNN details Hezbollah's fiber-optic guided FPV drones — 15km+ cable, nearly undetectable by Israeli radar/jamming. Killed IDF Sgt. Idan Fooks on April 26. New challenge for Israel's defense systems.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Iran submits 14-point response to U.S. proposal to end war
outlets.summary: NPR details Iran's demands: end war in 30 days, US withdrawal, end blockade, reparations. Trump 'can't imagine it would be acceptable.'

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Trump is running out of options to contain gas price backlash
outlets.summary: WaPo argues Trump is running out of tools to contain political damage from $4.446 gas. Gulf Coast SPR releases insufficient. Inflation set to spike.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump says war with Iran necessary to prevent 'lunatics' from obtaining nuclear weapon
outlets.summary: Fox covers Trump defending war as existential necessity. Warns of restarting strikes 'if they misbehave.' $8.6B arms sales framed as strengthening regional allies.

outlets.name: Daily Wire
outlets.headline: In War Powers Letter to Congress, Trump Shares Changes Coming to Iran War
outlets.summary: Daily Wire frames Trump's 'hostilities terminated' letter as shrewd legal strategy. Highlights Senate's failure to pass War Powers Resolution.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Bulk carrier attacked by multiple small craft off Iran, UKMTO says
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera leads with UKMTO advisory: bulk carrier attacked by multiple small craft 11nm off Sirik at 11:30 UTC — first such attack since April 22. All crew safe. Coincides with Iran 14-point peace proposal.

outlets.name: PBS NewsHour
outlets.headline: Cargo ship near Strait of Hormuz reports being attacked as Iran makes new peace proposal
outlets.summary: PBS contrasts the cargo ship attack with Iran's diplomatic outreach. Highlights tension between IRGC's hardline posture and Iran's 14-point peace plan.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: US Treasury chief says Washington 'suffocating' Iran with blockade
outlets.summary: ToI leads with Bessent: 'real economic blockade — all hands on deck.' Iran may shut oil wells. CENTCOM: 49 vessels redirected. IDF strikes 120 Hezbollah sites over weekend.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Iran senior commander says hostilities 'likely' to resume
outlets.summary: Haaretz reports IRGC deputy commander Asadi's war resumption warning alongside Israeli strikes killing 6 including a child in Lebanon.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Leader: Persian Gulf and Strait of Hormuz enter new chapter under Iranian management
outlets.summary: PressTV amplifies Mojtaba Khamenei: 'disgraceful US defeat,' new Hormuz 'management,' bright future without US. Frames blockade as opportunity for permanent regional restructuring.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Iran cuts oil output as US blockade strains storage
outlets.summary: Iran International reports exports collapsed 70% to 567K bpd. Onshore storage approaching capacity — 12-24 days remaining. Older tankers used as floating storage.
